page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.d1ne-c8d3.8xlarge is an x86_64 architecture server powered by an Intel Xeon E5-2682v4 processor running at 2.5 GHz. It features 32 dedicated physical cores with a single thread per core and 128.0 GB of RAM, providing 4.0 GB of memory per core. A key characteristic of this instance is its massive local storage capacity, consisting of 70,866 GB of local HDD storage. Network performance is supported by a 20 Gbps baseline bandwidth.

Benchmark data reveals a clear tradeoff between single-core and multi-core performance. Single-core performance is relatively weak, as shown by the stress-ng single-core CPU test and poor single-threaded gzip compression. However, the 32 dedicated physical cores compensate in multi-threaded workloads, achieving average performance in multi-core stress-ng tests, multi-threaded bzip3 decompression, and PassMark CPU benchmarks. Memory bandwidth and database operations also perform in the average tier.

Given its massive HDD storage capacity and dedicated CPU allocation, this server offers high resource density for storage-intensive workloads. It is qualitatively cost-efficient for scenarios requiring large-scale data storage without the high cost of SSDs. The hardware profile is best suited for large-scale data warehousing, log processing, big data storage, and database workloads that require high capacity over high-speed random IOPS.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.d1ne-c8d3.8xlarge is an x86_64 server configured with 32 dedicated physical cores on an Intel Xeon E5-2682v4 processor running at 2.5 GHz, paired with 128.0 GB of RAM. Its defining feature is a massive 70,866 GB of local HDD storage, supported by a 20 Gbps baseline network bandwidth. Performance benchmarks indicate a tradeoff, with weak single-core CPU and single-threaded compression results, but average multi-core and memory bandwidth capabilities. This resource profile makes the server highly suitable for storage-heavy workloads, such as big data processing, log archiving, and large-scale data warehousing, where massive capacity is prioritized over high-speed SSD performance.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.d1ne-c8d3.8xlarge is an x86_64 server featuring 32 dedicated Intel Xeon cores, 128 GB RAM, and a massive 70,866 GB of local HDD storage, optimized for large-scale storage and database workloads.
meta_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.d1ne-c8d3.8xlarge features 32 dedicated Intel Xeon cores, 128 GB RAM, and 70,866 GB of local HDD storage for storage-heavy workloads.
tagline: A dedicated multi-core server featuring massive local HDD storage capacity and balanced memory for large-scale data archiving and storage-heavy workloads.
bullet_points: 32 dedicated Intel Xeon E5-2682v4 physical cores at 2.5 GHz
Massive 70,866 GB of local HDD storage capacity
128.0 GB of system memory with 4.0 GB per core
Suited for big data, log archiving, and storage-intensive databases
